positive: A highly stylized, geometric composition featuring abstract mountain ranges and celestial elements (crescents, stylized sunbursts, constellations). The artwork must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a chest print on apparel. Use a neo-tribal, vintage woodcut etching aesthetic with extreme attention to line weight and strong silhouettes. The composition should feature layered peaks, stylized lunar phases, and geometric patterns filling the negative space. Limited, high-contrast color palette of indigo blue, burnt orange, and cream. Vector graphic, clean lines, deep engraving style, solid flat background, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, noise, text, watermark, signature, artifact, lowres, poor anatomy, gradient, complex background, photorealism, messy, random elements, empty space, cartoon, graffiti
